name: Rapport d'Intervention
css: .fso-pdf{font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#1a1a1a;}.fso-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;border-bottom:3px solid #2563eb;padding-bottom:12px;margin-bottom:18px;}.fso-logo{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#2563eb;letter-spacing:-0.5px;}.fso-ref{text-align:right;font-size:10px;color:#555;}.fso-ref strong{font-size:14px;color:#1a1a1a;display:block;}.fso-badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;}.badge-termine{background:#d1fae5;color:#065f46;}.badge-en-cours{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e;}.badge-planifie{background:#dbeafe;color:#1e40af;}.badge-annule{background:#fee2e2;color:#991b1b;}.badge-default{background:#f3f4f6;color:#374151;}.fso-section{margin-bottom:16px;}.fso-section-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:#6b7280;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;padding-bottom:4px;margin-bottom:8px;}.fso-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px 20px;}.fso-field label{font-size:9px;color:#6b7280;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;display:block;margin-bottom:1px;}.fso-field span{font-size:11px;color:#111;display:block;}.fso-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px;margin-top:4px;}.fso-table th{background:#f8fafc;font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;color:#6b7280;padding:5px 6px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;text-align:left;font-weight:600;}.fso-table td{padding:5px 6px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;vertical-align:top;}.fso-table tr:nth-child(even) td{background:#fafafa;}.fso-table .text-right{text-align:right;}.fso-totals{margin-top:8px;text-align:right;}.fso-totals table{display:inline-table;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:220px;}.fso-totals td{padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;}.fso-totals .total-row td{font-weight:700;font-size:13px;border-top:2px solid #2563eb;padding-top:6px;}.fso-signature-block{display:flex;gap:24px;margin-top:8px;}.fso-sig-box{flex:1;border:1px solid #d1d5db;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;min-height:90px;}.fso-sig-box label{font-size:9px;color:#6b7280;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;display:block;margin-bottom:6px;}.fso-footer{margin-top:24px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-size:9px;color:#9ca3af;text-align:center;}
html:
{% set status_class = {'Terminé': 'badge-termine', 'En cours': 'badge-en-cours', 'Planifié': 'badge-planifie', 'Annulé': 'badge-annule'}.get(doc.status, 'badge-default') %}
{# ── EN-TÊTE ── #}
{{ doc.company or 'Flow' }}
{{ doc.name }} Rapport d'intervention
{{ doc.status }} {% if doc.priority and doc.priority != 'Normal' %}  {{ doc.priority }} {% endif %}
{# ── TITRE ── #}
{{ doc.title }}
{% if doc.activity_type %}
{{ doc.activity_type }}
{% endif %}
{# ── PLANIFICATION & EXÉCUTION ── #}
Planification & Exécution
{{ frappe.format(doc.scheduled_date, {'fieldtype': 'Date'}) or '—' }}
{{ doc.scheduled_time or '—' }}
{{ frappe.format(doc.actual_start, {'fieldtype': 'Datetime'}) or '—' }}
{{ frappe.format(doc.actual_end, {'fieldtype': 'Datetime'}) or '—' }}
{{ doc.scheduled_duration or '—' }}
{{ doc.actual_duration or '—' }}
{# ── CLIENT, PROJET, LIEU ── #}
Client — Projet — Lieu
{{ doc.customer_name or doc.customer or '—' }}
{% if doc.project %}
{{ doc.project_name or doc.project }}
{% endif %} {% if doc.fsm_location %}
{{ doc.fsm_location }}
{% endif %} {% if doc.fsm_equipment %}
{{ doc.fsm_equipment }}
{% endif %} {% if doc.contact_person %}
{{ doc.contact_person }}
{% endif %} {% if doc.territory %}
{{ doc.territory }}
{% endif %}
{% if doc.address_display %}
{{ doc.address_display | striptags | replace('\n', ', ') }}
{% endif %}
{# ── TECHNICIEN ── #}
Technicien
{{ doc.assigned_to_name or doc.assigned_to or '—' }}
{% if doc.fsm_team %}
{{ doc.fsm_team }}
{% endif %}
{{ doc.billing_type or '—' }}
{% if doc.billing_type == 'Forfait' and doc.fixed_price %}
{{ frappe.format(doc.fixed_price, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }}
{% endif %}
{# ── DESCRIPTION ── #} {% if doc.description %}
Description de l'intervention
{{ doc.description | striptags }}
{% endif %} {# ── PIÈCES ── #} {% if doc.parts %}
Pièces et produits utilisés
{% for part in doc.parts %} {% endfor %}
Référence Désignation Qté UoM P.U. Montant
{{ part.item_code or '—' }} {{ part.item_name or part.description or '—' }} {{ part.qty }} {{ part.uom or '' }} {{ frappe.format(part.rate, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }} {{ frappe.format(part.amount, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }}
Total pièces{{ frappe.format(doc.total_parts_amount, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }}
{% endif %} {# ── FEUILLES DE TEMPS ── #} {% if doc.timesheets %}
Temps passé
{% for ts in doc.timesheets %} {% endfor %}
Technicien Activité Début Fin Heures Facturable Montant
{{ ts.employee_name or ts.employee }} {{ ts.activity_type or '—' }} {{ frappe.format(ts.from_time, {'fieldtype': 'Datetime'}) or '—' }} {{ frappe.format(ts.to_time, {'fieldtype': 'Datetime'}) or '—' }} {{ ts.hours or 0 }} {% if ts.is_billable %}{{ ts.billing_hours or 0 }} h{% else %}—{% endif %} {% if ts.is_billable %}{{ frappe.format(ts.billing_amount, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }}{% else %}—{% endif %}
Total heures{{ doc.total_hours or 0 }} h
Total main-d'œuvre{{ frappe.format(doc.total_timesheet_amount, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }}
{% endif %} {# ── TOTAL GÉNÉRAL ── #} {% if doc.total_amount %}
TOTAL INTERVENTION{{ frappe.format(doc.total_amount, {'fieldtype': 'Currency'}) }}
{% endif %} {# ── SIGNATURE ── #}
Clôture et signature
{% if doc.customer_signature %} {% else %}
Non renseignée
{% endif %}
{{ doc.customer_feedback or '' }}
{# ── PIED DE PAGE ── #}
Document généré le {{ frappe.format(frappe.utils.now_datetime(), {'fieldtype': 'Datetime'}) }}  ·  {{ doc.company or '' }} {% if doc.project %}  ·  Projet : {{ doc.project_name or doc.project }}{% endif %}
